content.name: edit

edits.newText:
import { formatCurrencyAmount } from "@dfp/isomorphic-currency-amount";
import { createChart } from "@dfp/react-chart";

edits.oldText:
<Chart.Tooltip
          // we are using custom ReferenceArea, so we can control "highlighting" manually
          cursor={false}
          header={{ title: tt("chart.past") }}
          formatter={(value) => formatNumber(Number(value), language)}
        />
edits.newText:
<Chart.Tooltip
          // we are using custom ReferenceArea, so we can control "highlighting" manually
          cursor={false}
          header={{ title: tt("chart.past") }}
          formatter={(value) =>
            formatCurrencyAmount({
              value: Number(value),
              currency: legendData.currency,
              language,
            })
          }
        />
